name: terminal-image-paste
title: Terminal Image Paste
description: Paste clipboard image as a file path — works in any terminal, SSH session, or TUI app
author: iisweetheartii

commands.name: paste-image-path
commands.title: Paste Image as Path
commands.description: Save clipboard image to /tmp/clip-latest.png and type the path. Works in SSH, tmux, and any TUI.

preferences.name: remoteHosts
preferences.title: Remote SSH Hosts
preferences.description: Comma-separated SSH hosts to sync image to (e.g. myserver,user@host). Leave empty for local only.

scripts.prepublishOnly: echo 'Use npm run publish instead' && exit 1
